title: Gamba Family Vineyards Tasting
description:
Join us on Wednesday, March 18th from 4–7 PM at Whispering Vine South Creek for a tasting featuring the bold and expressive wines of Gamba Family Vineyards, a Sonoma producer known for powerful old-vine Zinfandels and rich field blends that showcase the depth and character of the region.

Tasting Fee: $35 (Buy a bottle from the tasting and your fee is refunded)

Featured Wines:

• Gamba ‘Messana Vineyard’ Fountain Grove District Zinfandel – Deep and powerful with cherry compote, vanilla, sandalwood and vibrant red berry fruit layered with warm spice.

• Gamba ‘Starr Road’ Zinfandel – Old-vine intensity showing raspberry preserves, wild berries, currant and black tea with supple tannins and a lingering finish.

• Gamba Etrusca Velia Proprietary Red – A plush old-vine field blend bursting with dark berry fruit, toasty oak and silky texture with notes of spice and polished tannins.

• Gamba Family Ranches Zinfandel 2020 – Bold yet lively with raspberry, blueberry, leather and spice framed by bright acidity and balanced structure.

Discover the depth and richness of Gamba’s small-production Sonoma wines—buy a bottle and your tasting is free.
